parameters.label: Local Auth Enabled
parameters.remediation: Set local_auth_enabled = false and grant App Configuration data-plane roles to managed identities.

parameters.label: Id
parameters.remediation: Create an azurerm_monitor_diagnostic_setting targeting the App Configuration store and send logs and metrics to Log Analytics.

parameters.label: Encryption
parameters.remediation: Use the Standard SKU, configure a UserAssigned identity, and add an encryption block with key_vault_key_identifier and identity_client_id.

parameters.label: Tags
parameters.remediation: Add the required organizational tags to the App Configuration store.

parameters.label: Identity.type
parameters.remediation: Configure a UserAssigned identity block. Customer-managed encryption requires a user-assigned identity.

parameters.label: Public Network Access
parameters.remediation: Configure a private endpoint and set public_network_access = "Disabled".

controls.title: App Configuration stores must disable access key authentication
controls.description: App Configuration clients must use Microsoft Entra identities instead of access keys.
controls.remediation: Set local_auth_enabled = false and grant App Configuration data-plane roles to managed identities.

controls.title: App Configuration stores should send diagnostic logs to Log Analytics
controls.description: Centralized App Configuration logs support security monitoring, auditing, and incident response.
controls.remediation: Create an azurerm_monitor_diagnostic_setting targeting the App Configuration store and send logs and metrics to Log Analytics.

controls.title: App Configuration stores should use customer-managed encryption
controls.description: Customer-managed keys provide control over App Configuration encryption key lifecycle and access.
controls.remediation: Use the Standard SKU, configure a UserAssigned identity, and add an encryption block with key_vault_key_identifier and identity_client_id.

controls.title: App Configuration stores must have tags
controls.description: App Configuration stores must include ownership, environment, and governance metadata.
controls.remediation: Add the required organizational tags to the App Configuration store.

controls.title: App Configuration stores must use managed identity
controls.description: Managed identity is required for secure customer-managed key access and credential-free integrations.
controls.remediation: Configure a UserAssigned identity block. Customer-managed encryption requires a user-assigned identity.

controls.title: App Configuration stores must disable public network access
controls.description: App Configuration stores must use private connectivity instead of public endpoints.
controls.remediation: Configure a private endpoint and set public_network_access = "Disabled".
